pregame_model_read.pre_bet_thesis: 7+ was below the projected median and offered plus-money cushion. The model warned against 8+/9+ public-ceiling ladders but supported 7+ as the clean threshold-value entry.

pitch_notes.four_seam_fastball: 37 pitches, 4 K, 97.4 mph avg, 27% CSW; velocity intact but not the only K driver.
pitch_notes.sweeper: 23 pitches, 2 K, 40% whiffs per swing, 39% CSW; strong secondary swing-miss weapon.
pitch_notes.changeup: 21 pitches, 3 K, 67% whiffs per swing, 38% CSW; major putaway pitch vs LHH-heavy looks.
pitch_notes.splitter: 9 pitches, 0 K, 22% CSW; limited direct K impact.
pitch_notes.slider: 8 pitches, 1 K, 50% whiffs per swing, 38% CSW; strong small-sample support.

what_worked: The model correctly prioritized 7+ as the best threshold-value entry instead of chasing higher ladders.
Skenes finished with 10 Ks, clearing the 7+ line by three strikeouts.
Whiff sustainability was elite: 20 whiffs on 49 swings and 32% CSW overall.
Multi-pitch K depth was confirmed through four-seam, sweeper, changeup, and slider production.
Contact suppression was elite with 0 hard-hit balls on 10 BBE and 79.9 avg EV allowed.
what_to_modify: Continue respecting pitch-count inflation risk for higher ladders: 103 pitches by 5.1 IP would have made live 11+/12+ ladders dangerous.
Keep separating Skenes threshold value from public ceiling tax.
model_evaluation.patch_recommendation: KEEP THRESHOLD_VALUE_K_EDGE for elite arms when the offered line is below model median and plus money is available. Maintain anti-burn restriction on 9+ ladders unless live pitch economy is also clean.

notes: This was a clean LIVE-FLOW threshold-value win. The 7+ market at +113 was below the model median and offered major implied-probability cushion. Skenes reached 10 Ks despite 3 BB and 103 pitches, confirming that elite whiff depth can overcome moderate pitch-count inflation at the correct threshold.
